opinion.h4: AHOYIAN ET AL. v. MASSACHUSETTS TURNPIKE AUTHORITY ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF MASSACHUSETTS. No. 473. Decided December 3, 1962.
opinion.p: Edward O. Proctor, Arthur E. Sutherland and Kevin Hern for appellees.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
NAPIER v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE THIRD CIRCUIT. No. 452, Misc. Decided December 3, 1962.
Solicitor General Cox for the United States et al.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
